mnemonics.title: Lasso vs Ridge
mnemonics.content: Lasso sets coefficients to zero, Ridge does not

acronyms.expansion: Least Absolute Shrinkage and Selection Operator

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a penalty term added to the loss function
Imagine Lasso setting coefficients to zero, Ridge not

analogies.analogy: Like a referee in a game, preventing overfitting
Like two different coaches, one strict (Lasso), one lenient (Ridge)
